pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, which explicitly hardcode this path as the base string for the target database.

Verified by reviewing the task description and setup_task.sh. The free version of Jolly Lobby Track uses .mdb (Microsoft Access) by default for its internal sample database, and the setup script creates this file as the target.
Verified by reviewing export_result.sh, which explicitly queries this Wine registry key path to confirm if the connection string was successfully updated.

Verified by reviewing export_result.sh which explicitly checks for .ldb, .laccdb, and .slock extensions. Furthermore, .ldb and .laccdb are standard Microsoft Access lock files, while .slock is used for SQL Server Compact.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to connect Jolly Lobby Track to an archived database located at /home/ga/Documents/visitor_archive_2024.mdb. The evaluation relies on verifying the presence of an active connection lock file (.ldb, .laccdb, or .slock) alongside the database, as well as confirming that the database path was updated in the Wine registry under 'HKCU\Software\Jolly Technologies'.
